hero.description: We blend artistic vision with structural precision to create environments that inspire and endure. From concept to completion, we build your vision.

contact.label: Contact Us

footer.tagline: Crafting timeless spaces that harmonize with their environment and elevate the human experience.
footer.architecturalDesign: Architectural design of Civil & Industrial Projects

story.p1: With nearly a decade in the architectural landscape of Vietnam, TKM Architecture remains dedicated to the quiet pursuit of creating thoughtful living spaces.
story.p2: We have been fortunate to cultivate our expertise across a diverse range of scales — from commercial and residential projects to complex developments and urban planning.
story.p3: By blending global insights with deep local understanding, we focus on refining our craft to deliver authentic value to the community.

items.title: URBAN PLANNING
items.brief: Shaping the future of cities through strategic growth and sustainable zoning.

items.title: COMPLEXES
items.brief: Designing multi-purpose spaces that foster community and technological synergy.

items.title: BUILDINGS
items.brief: Architecting iconic structures that redefine skylines and celebrate human experience.

items.title: DESIGN
items.brief: Refining the tactile and visual soul of architecture through meticulous detail.

items.title: MANAGEMENT
items.brief: Ensuring operational longevity and technological excellence in the built environment.

members.name: Nam Nguyen
members.bio: Visionary leader with a passion for integrating Vietnamese cultural elements into modern architecture.

members.name: Huy Nguyen
members.bio: Expert in sustainable urban development and detailed technical execution.

hero.p1: Our customs are grounded in the understanding that the success of a project is based as much upon delivering professionalism, value, and creative solutions, as to sensitivity and responsiveness to Client, and a projects stakeholders.
hero.p2: Each environment we create is designed in response to the bigger picture, yet tailored to suit unique brand, perspectives and local context. We believe that the success of a project is not achieved when we complete the concept design, but when it is realized in the image envisioned.
